languages.text: Погонщица — опасное создание, однако у нее есть одна известная слабость — огонь. По рассказам меровцев, он прекрасно разрушает естественную броню твари.
The Drover is a dangerous creature, but it has one known weakness: fire. According to the Merovians, fire is excellent at destroying the creature's natural armour.
languages.original_text: Погонщица — опасное создание, однако у нее есть одна известная слабость — огонь. По рассказам меровцев, он прекрасно разрушает естественную броню твари.

traits.locale_text: The Drover is a dangerous creature, but it has one known weakness: fire. According to the Merovians, fire is excellent at destroying the creature's natural armour.
The Drover is a dangerous creature, but it has one known weakness: fire. According to the Merovians, fire is excellent at destroying the creature's natural armour.
The Drover is a dangerous creature, but it has one known weakness: fire. According to the Merovians, fire is excellent at destroying the creature's natural armour.

languages.text: 牧畜民は危険な生き物だが、弱点の一つは火である。メロヴィアンによると、火は牧畜民の自然の鎧を破壊するのに非常に有効である。
languages.original_text: The Drover is a dangerous creature, but it has one known weakness: fire. According to the Merovians, fire is excellent at destroying the creature's natural armour.

traits.locale_text: 牧畜民は危険な生き物だが、弱点の一つは火である。メロヴィアンによると、火は牧畜民の自然の鎧を破壊するのに非常に有効である。

languages.text: El Pastor es una criatura peligrosa, pero tiene un punto débil conocido: el fuego. Según los merovianos, el fuego es una excelente medida contra la armadura natural de la criatura.
languages.original_text: The Drover is a dangerous creature, but it has one known weakness: fire. According to the Merovians, fire is excellent at destroying the creature's natural armour.

traits.locale_text: El Pastor es una criatura peligrosa, pero tiene un punto débil conocido: el fuego. Según los merovianos, el fuego es una excelente medida contra la armadura natural de la criatura.

languages.text: Der Treiber ist eine gefährliche Kreatur, hat aber eine Schwäche: Feuer. Den Merovianern zufolge kann Feuer die natürliche Panzerung der Kreatur zerstören.
languages.original_text: The Drover is a dangerous creature, but it has one known weakness: fire. According to the Merovians, fire is excellent at destroying the creature's natural armour.

traits.locale_text: Der Treiber ist eine gefährliche Kreatur, hat aber eine Schwäche: Feuer. Den Merovianern zufolge kann Feuer die natürliche Panzerung der Kreatur zerstören.

languages.text: Le Chasseur est une créature dangereuse, mais il craint une chose : les flammes. À en croire les Meroviens, le feu serait la meilleure solution pour détruire la protection naturelle de la créature.
languages.original_text: The Drover is a dangerous creature, but it has one known weakness: fire. According to the Merovians, fire is excellent at destroying the creature's natural armour.

traits.locale_text: Le Chasseur est une créature dangereuse, mais il craint une chose : les flammes. À en croire les Meroviens, le feu serait la meilleure solution pour détruire la protection naturelle de la créature.

languages.text: “拒生花”是一种极其危险的生物，但据悉它有一处弱点：惧怕火焰。根据梅罗夫人的经验，火焰能有效毁伤该生物的天然护甲。
languages.original_text: The Drover is a dangerous creature, but it has one known weakness: fire. According to the Merovians, fire is excellent at destroying the creature's natural armour.

traits.locale_text: “拒生花”是一种极其危险的生物，但据悉它有一处弱点：惧怕火焰。根据梅罗夫人的经验，火焰能有效毁伤该生物的天然护甲。

languages.text: Çoban tehlikeli bir yaratık olsa da bilinen bir zayıflığı var: Ateş. Merovlulara göre ateş, yaratığın doğal zırhını yok etmekte mükemmel derecede başarılı.
languages.original_text: The Drover is a dangerous creature, but it has one known weakness: fire. According to the Merovians, fire is excellent at destroying the creature's natural armour.
